name: Chain of Ahes
desc: Fire impacts chain to a nearby enemy for bonus damage and burn

name: Tidal Seal
desc: Every 3 Water hits on the same enemy apply a damage-taken seal

name: Turbulence
desc: Air hits force enemies to walk backward for 2 seconds

name: Aftershock
desc: Earth kills trigger a mini quake with 40% damage in a smaller area

name: Absolute Zero
desc: Frozen enemy deaths freeze nearby enemies in a small radius

name: Toxic Spill
desc: Every 5 poison applications trigger an instant stack explosion

name: Prism
desc: Light pillars always target the highest-health enemy in range

name: Pressure Surge
desc: After 5 Steam knockbacks, the target explodes for its remaining HP in a small radius

name: Gold Fund
desc: Gold pillars stop generating gold. Each finished wave grants (wave + 1) * 10 gold
